title: Super Mario Paint - Mario Land 2 Ending
description:
I have absolutely no idea what I'm doing with my life anymore.

Super Mario Paint is pretty sweet, anyway. Oh yeah, and this is my first time throwing a few of my own little embellishments into it, like a stupidly simplistic outro.
